issue_summary: ValueGraph.edgeValue*: change from * V edgeValue(), V edgeValueOrDefault() to * Optional<V> edgeValue(), V edgeValueOrNull()
javadoc_before:
/** * If there is an edge connecting {@code nodeU} to {@code nodeV}, returns the non-null value * associated with that edge. * *

In an undirected graph, this is equal to {@code edgeValue(nodeV, nodeU)}. * * @throws IllegalArgumentException if there is no edge connecting {@code nodeU} to {@code nodeV}. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns the value of the edge connecting {@code nodeU} to {@code nodeV}, if one is present; * otherwise, returns {@code Optional.empty()}. * *

In an undirected graph, this is equal to {@code edgeValue(nodeV, nodeU)}. * * @throws IllegalArgumentException if {@code nodeU} or {@code nodeV} is not an element of this * graph */
